title: Parameter/enum gives AstNode is not of expected type
body:
I have some code I am attempting to Verilate using Verilator 4.228.  I get no error message and the same code verilates fine with 4.034.  Here is the error message from the 4.228 attempt:

```
%Error: Internal Error: /project/work_jordan/abc_100/verif/build_with_verilator_4.228/../../include/../include/xyz_pkg.sv:8:16: ../V3Ast.h:1976: AstNode is not of expected type, but instead has type 'VAR'
-node: VAR 0xf86340 <e2591> {n8aq} u1=0x8cb74a0 @dt=0@  QQD8DBiN5S [VSTATIC]  LPARAM
    8 |     localparam QQD8DBiN5S  = 8;
      |                ^~~~~~~~~~
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
- V3Ast.cpp:1120:     Dumping /project/work_jordan/abc_100/build/../build/vobj_xyz_def/vobj_xyz_def_main/Vxyz_def_main_990_final.tree
```
